title: Senior Business Development Manager at Hiranandani Group Ventures Solutions

jsonLd.title: Senior Business Development Manager at Hiranandani Group Ventures Solutions
jsonLd.description:
We at Hiranandani Group Ventures Solutions are looking for an experienced Business Development Manager based out of Allahabad. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Hiranandani Group Ventures Solutions:
Hiranandani Group Ventures Solutions is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Maintain a pipeline of qualified leads using CRM software
• Negotiate pricing, terms, and conditions on behalf of clients
• Conduct site visits and property presentations for clients
• Liaise with banks and NBFCs for home loan assistance to customers
• Build relationships with channel partners and brokers
• Coordinate with architects, contractors, and project teams
• Prepare presentations and proposals for institutional clients

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in Contract Management
• Proficiency in GIS Tools
• Proficiency in Portfolio Management
• Proficiency in RERA Compliance
• Proficiency in Negotiation Skills
• Proficiency in Investment Analysis
• Proficiency in Lease Administration

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Learning & development budget
• Life and accident insurance
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Allahabad, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Hiranandani Group Ventures Solutions!
